vocab.example: I try to walk as much as possible to counteract the effects of a sedentary lifestyle spent behind a desk.

vocab.meaning: đi dạo thong thả dọc theo
vocab.example: On weekends, I love to stroll along the riverbank to enjoy the fresh air and unwind.

vocab.meaning: sự tiện lợi không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: The unbeatable convenience of walking means I don't have to worry about traffic jams or parking spots.

vocab.meaning: dấu chân carbon (lượng khí thải cá nhân)
vocab.example: Walking everywhere is my personal way of reducing my carbon footprint and protecting the environment.
My daily route involves a steep incline, which serves as a great cardiovascular workout.

vocab.meaning: tốc độ chậm rãi, thư thái
vocab.example: I usually walk at a leisurely pace when I'm exploring new parts of the city to take in all the details.

vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn về tâm trí
vocab.example: The mental clarity I gain from a long morning walk is essential for a productive day ahead.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có cảnh quan đẹp
vocab.example: Even if it takes longer, I always opt for the scenic route through the park rather than the main road.
Walking long distances regularly has significantly improved my physical stamina over the years.

vocab.meaning: đường lộ lớn nhộn nhịp/sầm uất
vocab.example: I enjoy walking through the bustling thoroughfares of the city center to feel the urban energy.
